name: Nitter
description: Browse Twitter without tracking or ads
compose:
name: slashnode-nitter
services:
  web:
    image: ceramicwhite/nitter:build-38985af
    container_name: nitter-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    init: true
    command: |
      /bin/sh -c "sed -i  -e 's/localhost/nitter-redis/g'  -e 's/redisPassword = \"\"/redisPassword = \"moneyprintergobrrr\"/g'  -e 's/theme = \"Nitter\"/theme = \"auto_(twitter)\"/g'  /src/nitter.conf && ./nitter"
    depends_on:
      - redis
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8420:8080
  redis:
    image: redis:6.2.2-buster
    container_name: nitter-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command: redis-server --save 60 1 --loglevel warning --requirepass moneyprintergobrrr
    volumes:
      - redis_data-redis:/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  redis_data-redis:
    name: slashnode-nitter_redis_data-redis
